tasks.title: Close April 2026 in the ledger (6 regulated ops)
tasks.context: April close is the last open monthly period; 6 regulated operations remain after the bank statement was posted on 14.06.
tasks.next_action: Run the 6 closing operations in 1C, then re-check the balance.

history.event: Client sent the missing April invoices via Telegram.
Bank statement for April posted; 2 of 6 closing ops done.

assist.hypothesis: Ready to finish — the inputs are in. The remaining 4 ops are mechanical; no client action needed.

actions.label: Run the close
actions.prompt: Close April for SP Aurora Bakery: run the remaining 4 regulated operations in 1C and re-check the balance.

actions.label: Show the checklist
actions.prompt: Show the month-close checklist for SP Aurora Bakery and where we are.

actions.label: Defer 2 days
actions.prompt: Defer the April close for SP Aurora Bakery by 2 days with a reminder.

tasks.title: June advance: notification + payment order
tasks.context: June advance for USN 6%. The client asked for the exact figure today (see the morning mail).
tasks.next_action: Confirm the advance amount, draft the notification + payment order.

history.event: Client emailed asking for the exact figure before noon.

assist.hypothesis: The estimate (19,000) is solid; reconcile it against the latest bank inflow before confirming to the client.

actions.label: Draft the figure + PO
actions.prompt: For SP Aurora Bakery, reconcile the June USN advance against the latest statement and draft the notification + payment order.

actions.label: Reply to the client
actions.prompt: Draft a short reply to SP Aurora Bakery confirming the June advance amount.

tasks.title: Fee control — Q2 2026 (postpaid)
tasks.context: Postpaid quarterly fee; verify receipt on the statement.
tasks.next_action: Check whether the quarterly fee has been received.

tasks.title: Confirm the webshop revenue OKVED is registered
tasks.next_action: Ask the client / check the source.

assist.hypothesis: The webshop activity is very likely covered by the existing additional OKVED 47.91; worth a 1-minute EGRIP check before the next close.

actions.label: Check & close
actions.prompt: Check the EGRIP extract for SP Aurora Bakery; if 47.91 is present, close this question.

actions.label: Ask the client
actions.prompt: Ask SP Aurora Bakery to confirm which OKVED codes are registered.

actions.label: Defer a quarter
actions.prompt: Defer the OKVED question for SP Aurora Bakery with a wake-up next quarter.
